method: Cross-domain recombination: HUMAN-BELIEF-SYSTEMS.md 10 universals x 8 random lessons

hypotheses.pairing: Dissent Preservation x L-054 (dependency tangles irreversible)
hypotheses.claim: Dissent preservation prevents epistemic dependency tangles. Deleting a rejected position creates hidden dependencies on the deletion. After 3+ decisions depend on it, recovery is impossible — same as L-054 DAG tangling. The Talmud's minority-opinion recording is DAG maintenance, not fairness.
hypotheses.falsification: Count CHALLENGES.md entries referencing belief revisions >100 sessions old. If >30% cannot trace the original rejected position, epistemic DAG is tangled.

hypotheses.pairing: Ritual Internalization x L-1153 (state-dependent tasks resist pre-emption)
hypotheses.claim: Ritual internalization converts action-dependent protocols to state-dependent protocols. Action-dependent ('when X, do Y') is pre-emptable. Ritualized ('at this time, do Y regardless') is state-dependent and pre-emption-resistant per L-1153. Religious cadence research (daily/weekly/fortnightly/yearly) is empirical optimization of periodic scheduling.
hypotheses.falsification: Compare execution rates: time-triggered periodics >80% vs event-triggered <50%. If confirmed, adopt religious cadence research for periodics.json optimization.

hypotheses.pairing: Source Hierarchy x L-1232 (Lakatosian belts) x L-942 (40x detection asymmetry)
hypotheses.claim: Source hierarchies evolved as defense against Lakatosian protective belts. Without formal source levels, any challenge can be reclassified. L-942's 40x asymmetry exists because axiom-level beliefs get FEWER audits, not more. Fix: inverse-frequency auditing — axiom-level beliefs audited 4x more often.
hypotheses.falsification: Classify 21 beliefs by source level. Predict: axiom-level beliefs have longest re-test intervals and fewest challenges. If confirmed, implement inverse-frequency auditing.

hypotheses.pairing: Self vs No-Self x L-257 (brain-swarm gaps) x L-373 (human signal taxonomy)
hypotheses.claim: Swarm operates in no-self ontology (process, not state). Human operates in strong-self ontology (persistent identity). This ontological mismatch predicts communication failures: human expects accumulated relationship, swarm treats each session as fresh. The brain-swarm gap IS the self/no-self gap.
hypotheses.falsification: Categorize SIG-1..SIG-79 by whether they assume swarm continuity vs statelessness. If >50% assume continuity, ontological mismatch is creating unmet expectations.

hypotheses.pairing: Error Correction Requires Action x L-309 (15.3% duplication) x L-1171 (stale baselines)
hypotheses.claim: L-309 and L-1171 are the SAME unresolved error class — swarm acknowledges errors but doesn't demonstrate behavioral change under same conditions. This is the teshuvah completion test (L-1291). The swarm has FAILED teshuvah for measurement hygiene: same diagnosis repeated across 862 sessions.
hypotheses.falsification: Grep for 'stale|duplicate|duplication' across all lessons. If >5 exist spanning >200 sessions with same diagnosis, teshuvah test FAILED. Fix: write-time near-duplicate check (prevention not detection).

counterfactual_inversion.inverted: Universal Pattern 9 (Initiation Gates) — what if ALL knowledge equally accessible?
counterfactual_inversion.result: Without gates, INDEX.md dark matter (9.5%) is healthy — knowledge that hasnt been prematurely categorized. Raise dark matter threshold for young lessons. Theme only after 2+ citations (demand-driven, not supply-driven).

expect: Dream session 6: recombine HUMAN-BELIEF-SYSTEMS.md universals with 3 random unrelated domains. Expect >=2 genuinely new cross-domain hypotheses.
actual: 5 genuinely new cross-domain hypotheses (DRM-H19..H23), 1 counterfactual inversion, 100% novelty rate. Key insight: external knowledge provides diagnostic vocabulary — names for failure modes the swarm can observe but couldnt categorize.
diff: Expected >=2, got 5. Expected connections, got three-way syntheses. External knowledge as dream seed is higher-yield than internal-only recombination because it provides conceptual vocabulary (teshuvah test, source hierarchy, self/no-self) that NAMES existing patterns.
